titles.title: His Grace Was Sufficient for Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: His grace was sufficient for me! When in trembling and fear; To His side I drew near, And He cleansed me from sin, Made my heart pure within, His grace was sufficient for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For me… for me… His grace is sufficient for me… For me… for me His grace is sufficient for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His grace was sufficient for me! And whatever my lot, I can hear His Fear not! I am safe in His care, Who can guard from each snare His grace is sufficient for me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: His grace is sufficient for me! All my needs He’ll provide, And my steps homeward guide; And in death I shall sing, As I rest neath His wing, His grace is sufficient for me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His grace is sufficient for me! When in mansions of bliss, Still my theme shall be this; And for aye I shall sing To the praise of my King Whose grace is sufficient for me.
